columns.extraction_plan: The number and percentage of participants with a Performance Status (PS) score of 0 in the treatment arm is not reported. While the methods section on page 4 mentions "WHO performance status (0 vs 1 or 2)" as a stratification factor for randomization, the baseline characteristics table (Table 1 on page 5) and the text do not provide the distribution of patients within these PS categories for the treatment arm.

The number and percentage of participants with a Performance Status (PS) score of 0 in the control arm is not reported.
